This inviting four bedroom, two bathroom residence rests on a 70 x 131 foot lot featuring a tall shade tree and low lying shrubs. The back of the house opens onto a fully screened in paved patio that is partially covered so that residents and guests can comfortably gather outdoors year round.  Wood columns accent the carport located at the end of a paved driveway while pavers provide a path to the covered front porch that has ample room for chairs plus a table.  The open floor plan sports new flooring throughout as well as new windows and sliders that fill the living and dining areas and fully updated kitchen with lots of natural light. An entryway large enough to fit a couch provides views all the way through to the big backyard.  Wide archways frame rooms highlighted by white walls and brightened by recessed lights, creating a decor that feels fresh and looks polished. Custom touches like the built-in shelves in the living and dining rooms and the luxury laminate that defines the kitchen countertops, breakfast bar and backsplash as well as the shower walls add an elevated look to the lovely interior.  The primary bedroom’s ensuite bathroom is separated by a sliding barn door that opens to a double sink vanity plus a walk-in, glass-enclosed shower. A large laundry room, abundant closet, cabinet and storage space and stainless steel appliances create a living space with loads of appeal.  Located within the Westshore/Beach Park area, Tampa International Airport is only a short drive away. The Howard Frankland Bridge connecting Tampa to the St. Petersburg/Clearwater communities and world famous west coast beaches is nearby. Professional sports fields, major shopping malls, outstanding museums and concert venues hosting headlining entertainment are all within close proximity.  Westshore is also a dining destination that offers fine dining to fast casual restaurants as well as multi-cultural cuisines and craft breweries. Gated communities and waterfront homes comprise much of the surrounding neighborhoods with many streets well suited for walking or biking."},"Roof":{"L":[{"S":"Shingle"}]},"Media":{"S":"https://s3.amazonaws.com/mlsgrid/images/MFR690835963/1d3bc3de-a199-4f4c-a977-e21d53359574.jpeg,
